_doc: Per-page a11y baseline — `<rule_id>: <node_count>`. Updates require explicit review (= a passing PR that intentionally raised or lowered a count). axe rules listed here are KNOWN serious/critical issues that pre-existed this baseline; the test enforces 'no new rule' AND 'no count increase' against this snapshot. Lower a count when fixing nodes; remove the entry when fixing the rule entirely. Captured 2026-05-10 against the prod backend.
